ናፍቀሽኛል… ግን ልደትሽ እየቀረበ መምጣቱ ደሞ ደስ ይለኛል ❤️
I miss you in the quiet parts of the day, especially when something sweet happens and I want to tell you first.
Missing you is not dramatic. It is just my heart noticing where it wants to be.
አንቺን ማጣት ቀላል አይደለም። ግን ፍቅራችን ከርቀት ይበልጣል።
I miss your voice, your face, your energy, and the version of me that gets to be near you.
Some nights I do not want much. Just you, close enough to hug🫂🫂🫂.
Distance is loud sometimes, but my love for you is louder.
I miss you, my love. Softly, deeply, stubbornly.
